title: PUD ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - 211info
text: COLUMBIA RIVER PUD PUD ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency financial assistance for electric bills and discount programs. The Income-Qualified Senior Discount provides a $20.00 discount on the monthly base charge on eligible customers' bills and 10% discount on the energy charges. The Special Waiver Program provides a $20.00 discount on the monthly base charge for eligible customers. Participants must be recertified annually to keep the waiver. The Glow Fund provides emergency bill payment assistance (the program is based on current funding availability). 64001 Columbia River Highway Deer Island, OR 97054 Eligibility: Emergency Bill Payment Assistance: - Must be a CRPUD customer, and meet the state of Oregon guidelines for energy assistance of at or below 60% of state median income. Income-Qualified Senior Discount: - Must be a CRPUD customer, and meet the state of Oregon guidelines for energy assistance of at or below 60% of state median income. - Age 62 and older. Special Waiver Program: - Must be a CRPUD customer, and meet the state of Oregon guidelines for energy assistance of at or below 60% of state median income. Glow Fund Program: - Must be a CRPUD customer, and meet the state of Oregon guidelines for energy assistance of at or below 60% of state median income. - Must be up for disconnection for non-payment or currently disconnected for non-payment. Hours: Monday-Thursday 7am-5:30pm Email (503) 397-1844 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 397-1844 Main phone Customer Accounts Main phone (503) 397-1844 Customer Accounts Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of address and income LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Columbia and Multnomah Counties Services: Discounted Electric Service Electric Service Payment Assistance If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COLUMBIA RIVER PUD
